# MyResumeBullets — AI Resume Bullet Generator

> A free, AI-powered tool that generates 10 professional, action-verb-led resume bullet points for any job title in seconds. No sign-up required.

## About

MyResumeBullets helps job seekers, students, career changers, and professionals write stronger resume bullet points using AI. The tool is built on the OpenAI API and is optimized to produce achievement-focused, ATS-friendly bullet points.

- URL: https://www.myresumebullets.com
- Free to use, no account required
- Generates 10 unique resume bullet points per request
- Supports any job title across every industry

## Key Pages

- [Home / Generator](https://www.myresumebullets.com/) — The main resume bullet generator tool
- [All Job Pages](https://www.myresumebullets.com/jobs) — Pre-generated bullet points by job title
- [Resume Template Builder](https://www.myresumebullets.com/resume-template-builder) — Build a resume template
- [Blog](https://www.myresumebullets.com/blog) — Career tips and resume writing guides

## What This Tool Does

Given a job title, the AI generates 10 resume bullet points that:
1. Start with a strong action verb
2. Include quantified results or metrics where possible
3. Use industry-relevant keywords for ATS optimization
4. Focus on achievements and impact, not just duties

## Target Audience

- Students and recent graduates
- Active job seekers
- Career changers
- Professionals updating their resume

## Content Policy

All generated bullet points are AI-produced starting points. Users are encouraged to personalize them with their own real numbers, specifics, and experiences before including them in a resume.

## Contact

For support or inquiries, visit: https://www.myresumebullets.com/#support
